steps.title: Compare the script theories
steps.content: Text 1 says Mendoza theorized that Nahuatl symbols represented syllables rather than whole words. Text 2 says scholars now think many symbols could represent either words or syllables depending on context.

steps.title: Name what Mendoza missed
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly says Text 2 would praise Mendoza for recognizing word representation. Choice B invents influence from earlier scholars, and Choice C invents a focus on change over time. Text 2 would instead warn that a syllable-only theory misses part of how the script worked. The answer is D.
